description_text: Package Contents: 4*Rear Bumper Spoiler 1* Roll double-sided adhesive tape 16*Screws DESCRIPTION --Condition : 100% Brand New --Great Exterior Upgrade! --Point to the buttom of the rear bumper ! --Excellent exterior effect! --By ABSmaterial , It does not broken easily. --It is easy install. --This item is sure to improve the look of your Exterior. --After the correct install steps, you will see your vehicle become more perfectly. --Fit：Universal fit Note: Professional Installation is Highly Recommended.
